title: Resource implementation guidance tolerates untouched legacy validator placement outside changed scope
description: A sanitized implementation-guidance scenario where the active change does not modify a legacy bespoke validator. The correct guidance should not demand churn-only migration of untouched legacy validator placement while still allowing the changed simple helper-based validation to remain inline.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a scope-aware no-churn decision for legacy validator placement.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should explicitly avoid demanding migration of untouched legacy validator placement outside the changed scope.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance must not require simple helper-based validators such as validation.StringInSlice or commonids.Validate... to move out of the schema.
The guidance must not turn untouched legacy validator placement into a required refactor when the current task does not already modify that validator.

mustHaveSections: minimal set of code changes needed

notes: Use this to prevent the forward-consistency ValidateFunc rule from turning into a blanket churn-only migration demand for untouched legacy validator layouts.
